emails.subject: Re: Thursday
emails.body: Re: Thursday Thanks, Suz. As you know, this stinks. Friends help. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Thursday
emails.body: RE: Thursday We are all doing reasonably well, I think. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Thursday
emails.body: Thursday Ok, I've changed your expenses account and am into your calendar, etc. Do you just use your cell phone now. You don't have a pager any more right? Blackberry? Just updating my information. Still married to Neil???? Just kidding~~~~~

emails.subject: RE: Thursday
emails.body: RE: Thursday Have a blackberry and cell phone. To: Mann, Kay

emails.subject: FW: Thursday
emails.body: FW: Thursday It looks like I'm the only one here today, except for Carol, and she's only here until 11am. I'm off Friday and Monday, so have a happy New Year's. How was your Christmas? Kristine's sister was killed Sunday! Needless to say, that is very upsetting, and she and Emma are up in Nebraska. Her 2 little girls are in critical condition in the hospital while the family is a mess. That girl was 35 years old! It's so sad, and I just feel helpless that I can't do anything for Kristine! New York was great! To: Mann, Kay; Sager, Elizabeth; Tweed, Sheila; Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: Re: FW: Thursday
emails.body: Re: FW: Thursday Was it a car wreck? That is so sad. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: FW: Thursday
emails.body: RE: FW: Thursday Yes, they slipped on some ice and ran off the road. They weren't hurt and got out of the car and then another car came along and hit some ice and slammed into them (the driver is critical too). It's just horrible. To: Adams, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: FW: Thursday
emails.body: RE: FW: Thursday How completely horrible. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: FW: Thursday
emails.body: It just upsets me so! To: Adams, Suzanne
